briefdescription.para: Cross-validates C# DES output against the job_shop_lib Python reference (v2).

detaileddescription.para: Compares makespan CSVs and full operation schedules produced by the C# ValidationExporter against the job_shop_lib reference generator. Designed to be robust against common data quality issues: duplicate rows from re-runs, missing rules on either side, and large-scale mismatch sets requiring triage.

listitem.para: Run the C# ValidationExporter to produce csharp_makespans.csv and csharp_schedules.json.
Run the Python reference generator to produce reference_makespans.csv and reference_schedules.json.
Run this script from the directory containing all four files: pythoncompare_results.py
Coverage report: rows and instances found on each side, and any asymmetric pairs.
Per-rule summary showing match rate, average absolute delta, and maximum delta.
Instance × rule comparison table showing OK or a signed integer delta.
Top-10 worst mismatches by absolute delta, each with the first divergent operation.
Diagnosis hints inferring the likely bug class from the sign distribution of deltas and FCFS match rate.
Full merged DataFrame saved to comparison_results.csv.
1 — one or more mismatches found, or no common pairs could be compared.
